title: BetterDonutTools
description: The most stable plugin that provides exact replicas of the Amethyst items found on the DonutSMP server.
body:
# 🍩 BetterDonutTools BetterDonutTools is a Minecraft Paper/Spigot plugin that adds custom, time-limited Netherite tools with special abilities. You can give players powerful tools that work for a limited time, without durability loss and with unique mechanics. ## 🔮 Features ### ⏳ Timed Tools Each tool has a configurable lifetime (in days)
When expired, the tool is silently removed from the player’s hand ### 💎 Amethyst Tool Set Amethyst Pickaxe
Amethyst Axe
Amethyst Shovel
Amethyst Hoe
### 🛠️ Unbreakable Tools Durability never decreases
No vanilla enchantments or anvil usage required ### 🌍 Multi-Language Support Turkish 🇹🇷
English 🇬🇧
Language selectable via config.yml ### ⚙️ Fully Configurable Tool duration
Date format
Messages
Item names & lores ## ⌨️ Commands /bdt reload
/bdt amethyst_pickaxe [player]
/bdt amethyst_axe [player]
/bdt amethyst_shovel [player]
/bdt amethyst_hoe [player] ## 🔐 Permissions betterdonuttools.use – Receive tools
betterdonuttools.reload – Reload plugin # ⚠️ Important Notice This is my first Minecraft plugin.
While I tried to design it as clean and stable as possible,
there may still be minor bugs or edge cases.
Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are highly appreciated ❤️
